teaser: Alwar summer, heads-down at work, fresh keys to a Scrambler.

currentPlans.item: Alwar. Working from home through the summer — days are hitting 43°C, and we just clocked the hottest May night on record at ~32°C.
Heads-down at work — in the middle of an intensive new-feature development cycle, and most of my focused hours are going here.
Trying to hit the gym in the morning.
Picked up a Triumph Scrambler 400X. Rode the Distinguished Gentleman's Ride on May 17 — donations went to Movember for men's mental health.
